scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes a moody, reflective atmosphere using ambient rain sounds without any distracting dialogue.
- Hooks the viewer with a highly relatable problem: understanding English but hesitating to speak it due to fear of judgment.
- Positions Supernova's AI tutor as the safe, practical solution to build real-world speaking confidence over time.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
मेरी बात मानो, YOUR ENGLISH IS BETTER THAN YOU THINK. START SPEAKING IT!
We're looking for people who:
- English समझ लेते हैं, but speaking में अटकते हैं।
- Practice करना चाहते हैं, but fear making mistakes.
- Words पता हैं, but confidence is holding them back.
Supernova's AI Tutor helps you practice real daily conversations — so words come out naturally, without translating in your head.
Early on: You stop freezing mid-sentence.
Over time: You start replying confidently.
Eventually: English बोलना becomes your second nature.
START TODAY
